title: Fola David’s Artistic Masterpiece Unites Global Audience, Shatters Records - FinancialEDGE
description: P+ Measurement Services, Nigeria's leading media intelligence consultancy, recently conducted a comprehensive media performance audit on the largest drawing in the world by an individual, created by Fola David. His remarkable 1,000 square meter sketch, titled "Unity in Diversity," surpassed the previous record of 629.8 square meters set by India's Ravi Soni. Over five days,
html: P+ Measurement Services, Nigeria’s leading media intelligence consultancy, recently conducted a comprehensive media performance audit on the largest drawing in the world by an individual, created by Fola David.
